instruction:
Complete a verifiable rural barn landscape enhancement workflow using the image at /home/user/Desktop/publicdomainpictures-clouds-220109_1920.jpg. Each step produces measurable, verifiable outputs:

1. Create a new layer named exactly 'Sky_Drama' above the background. Use the Free Select tool to select the sky area (top 50% of the image). Apply Curves adjustment: create an S-curve to increase contrast by 25%, making the clouds more dramatic.

2. Create a new layer named exactly 'Barn_Red' above 'Sky_Drama'. Use the Hue-Saturation adjustment on the barn area: increase Red saturation by exactly +40 to make the barn color more vibrant.

3. Create a new layer named exactly 'Grass_Vibrant' above 'Barn_Red'. Use the Color Balance adjustment on the foreground grass area: add +20 to Green channel and +10 to Yellow channel to enhance the lush green appearance.

4. Create a new layer named exactly 'Roof_Detail' above 'Grass_Vibrant'. Use the Brightness-Contrast adjustment on the barn roof area: increase Contrast by exactly +15 to bring out the metal texture details.

5. Create a new layer named exactly 'Vignette' at the top of the layer stack. Use the Elliptical Select tool to create an oval covering 75% of the image from center, apply Select > Feather with 100px radius, invert selection, and fill with black at 20% opacity.

6. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Title' at the top-center with these exact specifications:
   - Content: 'COUNTRY LIFE'
   - Font size: 36px
   - Color: #ffffff (white)
   - Position: centered horizontally, 30px from top edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Title'

7. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Location' at the bottom-left corner with these exact specifications:
   - Content: 'RED BARN FARM'
   - Font size: 22px
   - Color: #8b4513 (saddle brown)
   - Position: 25px from left edge, 25px from bottom edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Location'

8. Create a new layer named exactly 'Frame' at the very top. Use Select > All, then Edit > Stroke Selection with a 10px solid color #556b2f (dark olive green) to create a border around the entire image.

9. Export the final image as 'country_barn.jpg' with exact specifications: JPEG format, width 1600 pixels (height auto), quality 95. Save the project as 'barn_project.xcf' with all layers preserved.
